ddls:
CREATE TABLE "training_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "timestep" INTEGER /* The timestep of the agent's action during training */,
  "logstd_action_dist" TEXT /* Logarithmic standard distribution of action taken by the agent */,
  "rewards" REAL /* Reward received by the agent after taking an action */,
  "obs" TEXT /* Observations made by the agent in the state */,
  "original_rewards" REAL /* Original rewards before any scaling or adjustments */,
  "avg_action_dist" TEXT /* Average distribution of actions taken across timesteps */,
  "actions" TEXT /* Actions taken by the agent during this timestep */,
  "human_obs" TEXT /* Human observations or feedback related to the agent's performance */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent being trained */,
  "episode" INTEGER /* Episode number within the training session */,
  "episode_step" INTEGER /* Step number within the episode */,
  "total_reward" REAL /* Cumulative reward for the episode up to this timestep */,
  "agent_state" TEXT /* State of the agent before taking the action */,
  "next_agent_state" TEXT /* State of the agent after taking the action */,
  "done" INTEGER /* Indicates if the episode is done after this timestep */,
  "epsilon" REAL /* Exploration rate at this timestep */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_logs_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name given to the agent */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model used for the agent (e.g., DQN, PPO) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the agent was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the agent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the agent (e.g., active, paused, retired) */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Last update to the agent's configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "simulation_name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation environment */,
  "environment_type" TEXT /* Type of the environment (e.g., Grid, Maze) */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters defining the characteristics of the simulation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the simulation environment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the simulation (e.g., active, paused, retired) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the simulation environment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent being trained */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation environment used for training */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the training session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the training session */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the training session */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the session (e.g., running, completed, paused) */,
  "total_timesteps" INTEGER /* Total number of timesteps in the session */,
  "total_episodes" INTEGER /* Total number of episodes in the session */,
  "total_reward" REAL /* Cumulative reward for the session */,
  "epsilon" REAL /* Initial exploration rate for the session */,
  "epsilon_decay" REAL /* Rate at which the exploration rate decays */,
  "epsilon_min" REAL /* Minimum exploration rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "human_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "log_id" INTEGER /* ID of the log this feedback relates to */,
  "feedback_score" REAL /* Score given by humans for the agent's action */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments made by humans regarding the agent's performance */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent being trained */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation environment used */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_human_feedback_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_human_feedback_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_human_feedback_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_human_feedback_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("log_id") REFERENCES training_logs ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter set */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent these parameters belong to */,
  "learning_rate" REAL /* Learning rate for the agent's training */,
  "discount_factor" REAL /* Discount factor used in the training algorithm */,
  "exploration_rate" REAL /* Rate of exploration vs exploitation during training */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation environment */,
  "epsilon_decay" REAL /* Rate at which the exploration rate decays */,
  "epsilon_min" REAL /* Minimum exploration rate */,
  "batch_size" INTEGER /* Batch size for training */,
  "target_update" INTEGER /* Frequency of target network updates */,
  "memory_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the experience replay memory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)
